postgres_version: PostgreSQL 17.6 on x86_64-pc-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (GCC) 15.2.0, 64-bit

constraints.definition: CHECK ((((disposition)::text <> ALL (ARRAY['requires_review'::text, 'confirmed_unusual'::text])) OR (plausible_benign_explanation IS NOT NULL)))
CHECK ((((status)::text <> 'resolved'::text) OR ((resolution_summary IS NOT NULL) AND (resolved_at IS NOT NULL))))
CHECK (((burn_rate_per_hour > (0)::numeric) OR ((projected_shortage_at IS NULL) AND (lower_bound_at IS NULL) AND (upper_bound_at IS NULL))))

CHECK (((((reserve_type)::text = 'shared_cash'::text) AND (provider_id IS NULL) AND (outlet_provider_account_id IS NULL)) OR (((reserve_type)::text = 'provider_e_money'::text) AND (provider_id IS NOT NULL) AND (outlet_provider_account_id IS NOT NULL))))

CHECK (((((role)::text <> 'agent'::text) OR (outlet_id IS NOT NULL)) AND (((role)::text <> ALL (ARRAY['provider_ops'::text, 'risk_analyst'::text])) OR (provider_id IS NOT NULL)) AND (((role)::text <> ALL (ARRAY['field_officer'::text, 'area_manager'::text])) OR (area_id IS NOT NULL))))
UNIQUE NULLS NOT DISTINCT (user_id, role, provider_id, area_id, outlet_id)

indexes.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX alert_anomaly_flags_pkey ON public.alert_anomaly_flags USING btree (alert_id, anomaly_flag_id)

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_alerts_active_dedup ON public.alerts USING btree (deduplication_key) WHERE ((state)::text = 'active'::text)

policies.qual:
CASE
    WHEN (provider_id IS NULL) THEN app.has_outlet_scope(outlet_id)
    ELSE app.has_provider_scope(provider_id, outlet_id)
END
(((provider_id IS NOT NULL) AND app.has_provider_scope(provider_id, outlet_id)) OR ((provider_id IS NULL) AND (outlet_id IS NOT NULL) AND app.has_outlet_scope(outlet_id)))

CASE
    WHEN (provider_id IS NULL) THEN app.has_outlet_scope(outlet_id)
    ELSE app.has_provider_scope(provider_id, outlet_id)
END

CASE
    WHEN (provider_id IS NULL) THEN app.has_outlet_scope(outlet_id)
    ELSE app.has_provider_scope(provider_id, outlet_id)
END

CASE
    WHEN ((reserve_type)::text = 'shared_cash'::text) THEN app.has_outlet_scope(outlet_id)
    ELSE app.has_provider_scope(provider_id, outlet_id)
END
